# Sirr Browser Extension

Manifest V3 WebExtension for Chrome and Firefox.
Store selected text as ephemeral Sirr secrets. Paste and burn secrets into input fields.

## Install

Chrome: Download sirr-chrome-*.zip from releases → chrome://extensions → Load unpacked
Firefox: Download sirr-firefox-*.zip → about:debugging → Load Temporary Add-on

## Usage

Store: Select text on any page → right-click → "Store to Sirr"
Paste: Right-click an input field → "Sirr" → select secret → fills in, burns after read

## Settings (click extension icon → Options)

- Mode: sirrlock.com (cloud) or self-hosted
- API Key: Your Sirr API key
- Organization ID: (optional) Routes to /orgs/{id}/secrets for multi-tenant
- Default TTL: How long secrets live (default: 24h)
- Default max reads: Read limit before burn (default: 1)

## Token Detection

Automatically detects token types from selected text: GitHub (ghp_), AWS (AKIA),
OpenAI (sk-), and others. Uses detected type as secret label.

## Source

github.com/sirrlock/sirr-extension
